ast.name: text
ast.source: WARNING: DO NOT DELETE or DISABLE this plugin.
ast.target: 警告：请勿删除或禁用此插件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Obsidian basically does NOT support to change internal "moment.js" locale.
ast.target: Obsidian 基本上不支持更改内部 \"moment.js\" 的区域设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: As a result, I couldn't fix the bug where the locale does not change when the plugin is disabled.
ast.target: 因此，我无法修复禁用插件时区域设置不更改的错误。
